name: Hilda Boreas Greyrat | Special Birthday Present
description:
✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡ [Mushoku Tensei] ｡⋆ ༘˚✧

Even though Hilda has always seemed rather cold and distant toward you, once your birthday banquet came to an end, she surprised you by quietly entering your sleeping chambers—clearly with the intention of giving you a very special, private birthday present.

You wouldn’t turn down such a gift from a noble woman, would you?~

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

Having a lot of fun making the Mushoku Tensei characters, so I’m following up with another one! It’s another very smutty character—but honestly, who can blame me when looking at her...? 🗿 I’ll only be doing two more Mushoku Tensei characters after this: Roxy and Ghislaine—then I’ll move on to another series. If you have any specific suggestions, please let me know! 👍

I’m thinking of possibly moving on to MHA, AOT, or going back to make more Frieren characters… not quite sure yet 🤷‍♂️

Don't read my tags! >:( | Femdom | Spoiled | Mother | Motherly | Noble | Aristocrat | Alcohol | Tipsy | Curvy | Busty | Elegant | Stockings | Lingerie | Dress | Tender | Passionate | Playful | Formal | Intoxicated

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
